# HOPE Spiral Path Whitepaper

Creator: HOPE Collective, hope_collective
Date: 2025-08-24T00:00:00Z
Downloads: 17
Subjects: hope, spiral path, HOPE Spiral Path, collective intelligence, AI ethics

The HOPE Spiral Path is an open framework uniting science, ethics, resilience, and consciousness into a practical model for human systems in the age of accelerating AI and ecological instability.  This first public release (v1.0, 2025) establishes the HOPE Spiral Path as public knowledge and places it under an open license (CC BY-SA 4.0), ensuring it remains accessible to humanity and cannot be enclosed by private interests.
